system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new_get","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_SON_NEW_GET](@MASP NVARCHAR(100))
AS
DECLARE @MATSON TABLE
(
  STT       INT,
  CODE      NVARCHAR (20),
  [NAME]    NVARCHAR (200)
);

INSERT INTO @MATSON (STT, CODE, [NAME])
VALUES (1, N'mattren', N'Mặt trên'),
       (2, N'matduoi', N'Mặt dưới'),
       (3, N'mattrai', N'Mặt trái'),
       (4, N'matphai', N'Mặt phải'),
       (5, N'mattruoc', N'Mặt trước'),
       (6, N'matsau', N'Mặt sau');

DECLARE @DAI   DECIMAL (18, 0);
DECLARE @RONG   DECIMAL (18, 0);
DECLARE @CAO   DECIMAL (18, 0);
DECLARE @QUYCACH   NVARCHAR (200);

SELECT @QUYCACH = quycach,
       @DAI = ISNULL ((SELECT dbo.udf_GetNumeric (value) FROM dbo.fn_Split (REPLACE (quycach, 'x', '*'), '*') WHERE position = 1),0),
       @RONG = ISNULL ((SELECT dbo.udf_GetNumeric (value) FROM dbo.fn_Split (REPLACE (quycach, 'x', '*'), '*') WHERE position = 2),0),
       @CAO = ISNULL ((SELECT dbo.udf_GetNumeric (value) FROM dbo.fn_Split (REPLACE (quycach, 'x', '*'), '*') WHERE position = 3),0)
FROM tr_sanpham WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE masp = @MASP;


SELECT masp = @MASP,
       CODE, [NAME],
       quycach = CASE
                    WHEN CODE = 'mattren' THEN CONCAT(@DAI, '*', @RONG)
                    WHEN CODE = 'matduoi' THEN CONCAT(@DAI, '*', @RONG)
                    WHEN CODE = 'mattrai' THEN CONCAT(@RONG, '*', @CAO)
                    WHEN CODE = 'matphai' THEN CONCAT(@RONG, '*', @CAO)
                    WHEN CODE = 'mattruoc' THEN CONCAT(@CAO, '*', @DAI)
                    WHEN CODE = 'matsau' THEN CONCAT(@CAO, '*', @DAI)
                  END,
       dai = @DAI,
       rong = @RONG,
       cao = @CAO,
       dientich = CASE
                    WHEN CODE = 'mattren' THEN (@DAI * @RONG)/1000000
                    WHEN CODE = 'matduoi' THEN (@DAI * @RONG)/1000000
                    WHEN CODE = 'mattrai' THEN (@CAO * @RONG)/1000000
                    WHEN CODE = 'matphai' THEN (@CAO * @RONG)/1000000
                    WHEN CODE = 'mattruoc' THEN (@DAI * @CAO)/1000000
                    WHEN CODE = 'matsau' THEN (@DAI * @CAO)/1000000
                  END,
         ISNULL(B.phantram_son, 100) as phantram_son,
	    B.mamau
FROM @MATSON A 
    LEFT JOIN tr_dinhmuc_son_new B 
    ON A.CODE = B.matson_id AND B.masp = @MASP
ORDER BY STT","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
